title: Fix Gemini API endpoint URL to resolve 404 error

requirements.summary: Hardcode correct Gemini Vision API endpoint URL in apiConfig.ts with proper query parameter construction
acceptanceCriteria: apiConfig.ts hardcodes the base URL as `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent`
The `buildGeminiUrl(apiKey)` function appends the API key as `?key=<apiKey>` query parameter
No dynamic construction can produce a URL missing `v1beta`, the model name, or `:generateContent`
Inline comments document the required URL structure for future maintainers

file_operations.description: Replace any dynamic endpoint construction with the hardcoded base URL `https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/gemini-1.5-flash:generateContent`. Ensure the `buildGeminiUrl(apiKey)` function appends the API key as a query parameter in the format `?key=<apiKey>`. Add inline comments explaining the required URL structure: the base must include `/v1beta/` (not `/v1/`), the model name `gemini-1.5-flash`, and the `:generateContent` suffix. Remove any code that could generate malformed URLs missing these components.

requirements.summary: Update analysisApi.ts to use POST with JSON body containing base64-encoded image in Gemini API format
acceptanceCriteria: Requests to Gemini use `fetch` with `method: 'POST'` and `Content-Type: application/json`
Request body is JSON-stringified with the `contents[].parts[]` structure containing both the text prompt and the inlineData object
Base64 data URI prefix is stripped before the value is placed in `inlineData.data`
The `mimeType` field is set dynamically from the actual file MIME type
No FormData or multipart/form-data code paths remain for the Gemini provider
A successful image upload no longer returns a 404 error

file_operations.description: Rewrite the Gemini API request logic to use `fetch` with `method: 'POST'`, `Content-Type: application/json`, and a JSON-stringified body structured as `{ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: <prompt> }, { inlineData: { mimeType: <mimeType>, data: <base64Data> } }] }] }`. Before placing the image data in `inlineData.data`, strip any data URI prefix (e.g., `data:image/jpeg;base64,`) to obtain raw base64. Set the `mimeType` field dynamically from the actual file MIME type (e.g., `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/webp`). Remove all FormData or multipart/form-data code paths for the Gemini provider. Ensure the preprocessed image is converted to base64 and embedded in the JSON payload.

requirements.summary: Add explicit 404 error detection and Portuguese error message with navigation to Settings in ProcessingScreen.tsx
acceptanceCriteria: When a 404 HTTP error is returned from Gemini, the processing animation stops
The error message 'Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.' is displayed in Portuguese
A button labeled 'Ir para Configurações' is shown that navigates to the Settings page
Other error types (400, 403, 500) continue to display their existing error messages

file_operations.description: Add error handling logic that explicitly detects HTTP 404 responses from the Gemini API. When a 404 is caught, stop the processing animation and display a clear Portuguese error message: 'Endpoint da API não encontrado (404). Verifique se a URL e o modelo estão configurados corretamente nas Configurações.' Include a button labeled 'Ir para Configurações' that uses TanStack Router navigation to redirect the user to the Settings page. Ensure other HTTP error codes (400, 403, 500, etc.) continue to display their existing error messages without modification.
